simplesect.para: true if initialization successful, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set log level for a specific tag.
Get log level for a specific tag.
Log a message at ERROR level.
Log a message at WARN level.
Log a message at INFO level.
Log a message at DEBUG level.
Log a message at VERBOSE level.

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag, const char *format,...) noexcept override
memberdef.name: Log

briefdescription.para: Log a message at specified level.

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag, const char *format, va_list args) noexcept override
memberdef.name: LogV

briefdescription.para: Log a message with va_list (for internal use)

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag, const char *file, hf_u32_t line, const char *function, const char *format,...) noexcept override
memberdef.name: LogWithLocation

briefdescription.para: Log a message with file and line information.

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag=nullptr) const noexcept override
memberdef.name: IsLevelEnabled

briefdescription.para: Check if a log level is enabled for a tag.

simplesect.para: true if level is enabled, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *tag=nullptr, bool detailed=true) const noexcept override
memberdef.name: PrintStatistics

parameterdescription.para: Log tag for the output (optional, uses implementation-specific default if nullptr)
If true, prints detailed per-level statistics

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *tag=nullptr, bool detailed=true) const noexcept override
memberdef.name: PrintDiagnostics

parameterdescription.para: Log tag for the output (optional, uses implementation-specific default if nullptr)
If true, prints detailed diagnostic information

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *tag=nullptr, bool detailed=true) const noexcept override
memberdef.name: PrintStatus

parameterdescription.para: Log tag for the output (optional, uses implementation-specific default if nullptr)

detaileddescription.para: All log methods return LOGGER_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED. Override with UART/SWO printf-based logging when integrating STM32 HAL.
